title: BLUELIGHT RAT: YARA Chrome/Edge Cookie Theft
description: Detects BLUELIGHT browser cookie theft targeting Google SID/OSID/__Secure-3PSID cookies for Gmail session hijacking and IMAP enablement. Source: Volexity YARA rule APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight_B $chrome and $msg strings.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events') and ('Original Log Content' like '%cookie_name: OSID%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%__Secure-3PSID%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%GM_ACTION_TOKEN%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%GM_ID_KEY=%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Failed to get chrome cookie%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Failed to get Edge cookie%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%Success to enable imap%') | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Process Name'
falsepositives: None expected - strings are unique to BLUELIGHT malware
